title: daphne abbreviata
intro: Daphne abbreviata, also known as the dwarf daphne, is a small, evergreen shrub native to the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains daphnetin and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Daphne abbreviata include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Daphne abbreviata is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in traditional medicine for the treatment of various ailments.
